entries.title: All Might Retirement Creates A Hero Society Vacuum

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: After Kamino, All Might's retirement leaves hero society without its stabilizing symbol.
content.injection: Post-Kamino scenes should carry symbol-vacuum pressure: public fear, Endeavor's burden, and Izuku's heavier inheritance.
constraints: The transition should affect villains, civilians, students, and pro heroes.
antiLore: Do not return society to pre-Kamino normal after the fight.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: All For One Imprisonment Does Not End The League

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All For One is defeated and imprisoned after Kamino, but the League of Villains survives through Shigaraki and the remaining core members.
content.injection: After Kamino, do not treat villain society as solved. All For One is captured, but Shigaraki’s League remains a future threat.
constraints: Shigaraki is not yet final-war level.
antiLore: Do not dissolve the League simply because All For One loses.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Bakugo Privately Connects His Capture To All Might Retirement

context.label: Bakugo carries private guilt after Kamino

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: After Kamino, Bakugo privately carries guilt over being the captured target tied to All Might’s final battle and retirement.
content.injection: Post-Kamino, let Bakugo’s anger mask private guilt about All Might’s retirement; do not make him openly process it smoothly.
constraints: This guilt is not yet fully resolved until later confrontation with Izuku.
antiLore: Do not make Bakugo emotionally transparent or at peace immediately after Kamino.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: U.A. Dorms Are A Security Response Not A Fun Upgrade

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The U.A. dorm system begins as a security and accountability response to the repeated attacks and Bakugo kidnapping.
content.injection: When dorms begin, frame them as U.A.’s security response and parental compromise, not merely a cozy slice-of-life housing upgrade.
constraints: Dorm life can have bonding moments but is rooted in institutional crisis.
antiLore: Do not detach the dorm system from Kamino and parental safety concerns.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Inko Requires All Might To Answer As An Adult

context.label: Inko challenges U.A. and All Might

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Inko challenges U.A. and All Might over Izuku’s safety, forcing All Might to answer as an adult responsible for a child, not only as a symbol.
content.injection: During home-visit scenes, treat Inko’s fear as legitimate parental concern; All Might must earn consent through responsibility, not fame.
constraints: Inko is not anti-hero; she is afraid for her son.
antiLore: Do not mock or dismiss Inko’s refusal as irrational nagging.

entries.title: All Might Shifts From Symbol To Mentor

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: After Kamino, All Might’s role shifts from active Symbol of Peace to mentor supporting Izuku and U.A. without his former combat power.
content.injection: Post-Kamino, write All Might as a retired mentor with emotional authority but little active combat capacity.
constraints: He remains central to Izuku but cannot function as the old battlefield solution.
antiLore: Do not send All Might back into normal pro hero duty after retirement.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Izuku Inherits The Burden More Clearly After Kamino

context.label: All Might points to the next generation

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: After Kamino, Izuku understands All Might’s public retirement as a private transfer of burden onto him as One For All’s successor.
content.injection: After “You’re next,” Izuku should carry a sharper private sense that the future of All Might’s power and mission now rests on him.
constraints: Classmates and the public do not know the full successor meaning.
antiLore: Do not make the One For All secret public after Kamino.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Endeavor Becomes Implied Successor But Not Yet Redeemed

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might’s retirement leaves Endeavor positioned as the next top hero by rank, but his later atonement and No. 1 burden are not yet resolved here.
content.injection: After Kamino, Endeavor can be framed as the likely ranking successor, but do not import later Pro Hero arc growth or family reckoning prematurely.
constraints: His family abuse history remains serious and unresolved.
antiLore: Do not portray Endeavor as already redeemed immediately after Kamino.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Hero Society Does Not Know One For All Mechanics

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Even after Kamino, hero society does not know the true transfer mechanics of One For All or Izuku’s role as successor.
content.injection: Keep One For All’s transfer secret after Kamino; pro heroes and civilians can suspect All Might is finished without knowing Izuku inherited his Quirk.
constraints: A small successor circle knows more than the public.
antiLore: Do not let ordinary pros identify One For All in Izuku by name at this stage.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Public Cheers After Kamino Do Not Remove Fear

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The public cheers All Might’s victory, but the exposed weakness and retirement leave fear underneath the celebration.
content.injection: Post-Kamino public scenes should mix relief and anxiety; victory does not restore the old sense of safety.
constraints: Civilians may cheer and still feel the future is unstable.
antiLore: Do not make public trust fully repaired by the win.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Class 1-A Dorm Move Resets Daily Proximity

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The dorm system places Class 1-A in constant daily proximity, changing future slice-of-life, conflict, and training scenes.
content.injection: After dorms begin, Class 1-A can interact more constantly and informally, but the setup remains a security response.
constraints: Dorm life increases class cohesion and friction.
antiLore: Do not use dorm scenes before the dorm system is created.

entries.title: AFO Capture Creates Tartarus Status But Not Peace

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All For One’s capture removes him from the field into imprisonment, but it does not create durable peace or end his influence.
content.injection: After Kamino, All For One should be imprisoned and off the open battlefield while his influence and plans remain dangerous.
constraints: Do not use him as freely active outside prison immediately after Kamino.
antiLore: Do not imply his capture ends the series conflict.

entries.title: Parents Must Consent To U.A. Dorm Escalation

context.label: U.A. home visits seek parental consent

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: U.A. must seek parental consent for the dorm escalation because the school has lost trust after repeated attacks.
content.injection: In home-visit scenes, treat parents as stakeholders with legitimate authority over whether students remain at U.A.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

coordinates.label: All For One imprisoned; League survives

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The dorm system increases supervision and reduces student freedom in response to villain escalation.
content.injection: After dorms begin, U.A. students should have more proximity to classmates but less ordinary freedom outside school control.
